name: company-agent
description: Company AI agent + chatbot frontend monorepo

scripts.dev: bun run --workspace=agent dev & bun run --workspace=client dev
scripts.build: bun run --workspace=agent build && bun run --workspace=client build
scripts.typecheck: bun run --workspace=agent typecheck && bun run --workspace=client typecheck
scripts.lint: bun run --workspace=agent lint && bun run --workspace=client lint
